title: Common Alloy Aluminum Sheet From South Africa: Final Results of Antidumping Duty Administrative Review; 2023-2024
content: The U.S. Department of Commerce (Commerce) determines that Hulamin Operations (Pty) Ltd. (Hulamin Operations) did not make sales of common alloy aluminum sheet (CAAS) from South Africa in the United States at less than normal value during the period of review (POR) April 1, 2023, through March 31, 2024.
